brief: Welcome post for VOIDBORN dark fantasy online TCG. Hook headline: "Deck the Abyss". Realm atmosphere: Cinderfall (infernus). Introduce four elemental realms, deck building, tactical battles, ranked play. Free to start at https://voidborn.fun. Instagram punchy + hashtags; Facebook longer story; Discord markdown feature list + play link.

image.prompt: Cinematic square close-up of a bioluminescent siren queen emerging from dark, deep-sea gothic coral ruins, glowing teal light against deep navy water, dark fantasy art style, moody atmospheric lighting, intricate scales and ethereal hair.
